hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】贝莱德推出新的比特币 ETF，利用备兑看涨策略产生收入；【CRYPTO】日本央行将利率提高至 31 年来的新高后，比特币上涨；【WORLD】日本加息至31年来最高。

items.title: BlackRock launches new Bitcoin ETF that generates income using a covered call strategy
items.summary: BITA holds bitcoin and BlackRock’s bitcoin ETF (IBIT) and generates income by selling call options on up to 35% of those IBIT holdings.
items.title_zh: 贝莱德推出新的比特币 ETF，利用备兑看涨策略产生收入
items.summary_zh: BITA 持有比特币和贝莱德的比特币 ETF (IBIT)，并通过出售高达 35% 的 IBIT 持有量的看涨期权来产生收入。

items.title: Bitcoin rises after Bank of Japan hikes interest rates to a 31-year high
items.summary: The Bank of Japan raised its key interest rate by 25 basis points to 1%, the highest level since 1995.
items.title_zh: 日本央行将利率提高至 31 年来的新高后，比特币上涨
items.summary_zh: 日本央行将基准利率上调25个基点至1%，为1995年以来的最高水平。

items.title: Japan raises interest rate to highest for 31 years
items.summary: The Bank of Japan has been raising rates from near-zero since 2024.
items.title_zh: 日本加息至31年来最高
items.summary_zh: 自 2024 年以来，日本央行一直在接近于零的水平上调利率。

items.title: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
items.summary: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.
items.title_zh: BBVA 通过 OpenAI 将人工智能置于银行业的核心
items.summary_zh: 了解 BBVA 如何将 ChatGPT Enterprise 扩展到 100,000 名员工，并与 OpenAI 合作，加速全球人工智能驱动的银行业转型。

items.title: BlackRock's new bitcoin ETF lets institutions earn from volatility. There's a catch.
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for June 16, 2026
items.title_zh: 贝莱德新推出的比特币 ETF 让机构能够从波动中获利。有一个问题。
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 6 月 16 日天气预报

items.title: Bitcoin rallies after Japan rate increase with XLM, INJ, UNI advancing
items.summary: Stellar’s XLM, Injective’s INJ and Uniswap’s UNI ranked among the best performers in the 100 biggest cryptocurrencies by market capitalization.
items.title_zh: 日本加息后比特币上涨，XLM、INJ、UNI 上涨
items.summary_zh: Stellar 的 XLM、Injective 的 INJ 和 Uniswap 的 UNI 在市值最大的 100 种加密货币中名列前茅。

items.title: Profit-taking across bitcoin, ether, solana as traders wait on the Iran signing
items.summary: A U.S.-Iran deal pulled oil lower and lifted stocks, but bitcoin's bounce is hesitant. ETF outflows just paused after a record run, and analysts say the market wants the deal signed before pricing it in.
items.title_zh: 交易员等待伊朗协议签署，比特币、以太币、solana 获利了结
items.summary_zh: 美国与伊朗的协议拉低了油价并提振了股市，但比特币的反弹却犹豫不决。 ETF 资金流出在创纪录的上涨之后刚刚暂停，分析师表示，市场希望在定价之前签署交易。

items.title: French BTC treasury firm Capital B developing STRC-style bitcoin credit instrument
items.summary: Capital B is developing a digital credit instrument similar to Strategy's STRC and Strive's SATA.
items.title_zh: 法国 BTC 财务公司 Capital B 开发 STRC 式比特币信贷工具
items.summary_zh: Capital B 正在开发类似于 Strategy 的 STRC 和 Strive 的 SATA 的数字信贷工具。

items.title: Bitcoin Policy UK CEO calls Michael Saylor’s STRC investment promotion ‘dishonest’
items.summary: "Saylor put out a video talking about his yield with STRC...it was making it out that there is no risk involved," says Ward.
items.title_zh: 英国比特币政策首席执行官称 Michael Saylor 的 STRC 投资促销“不诚实”
items.summary_zh: “塞勒发布了一段视频，谈论他与 STRC 的收益……这表明不存在任何风险，”沃德说。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
items.summary: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 合作伙伴网络简介
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出合作伙伴网络，投资 1.5 亿美元帮助全球合作伙伴加速企业人工智能的采用、部署和转型。

items.title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
items.summary: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises.
items.title_zh: Preply 如何结合人工智能和真人导师来实现个性化学习
items.summary_zh: Preply 使用 OpenAI 推出人工智能生成的课程摘要，提供个性化反馈和语言学习练习。

items.title: When it comes to predicting people’s preferences, it pays to consider “the power of three”
items.summary: MIT researchers provide a major upgrade to the nearly century-old idea of random utility models.
items.title_zh: 在预测人们的偏好时，考虑“三者的力量”是值得的
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员对近百年历史的随机效用模型理念进行了重大升级。

items.title: Iran deal presents political nightmare for Netanyahu
items.summary: Donald Trump's ceasefire agreement with Iran leaves the Israeli PM trapped in a new political and security dilemma.
items.title_zh: 伊朗协议给内塔尼亚胡带来了政治噩梦
items.summary_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普与伊朗的停火协议使以色列总理陷入了新的政治和安全困境。

items.title: Cuba tourism collapses as US pressure campaign bites
items.summary: The number of foreign visitors is down by 58% compared to last year, Cuban officials say, amid sanctions and an effective oil blockade.
items.title_zh: 由于美国施压行动的影响，古巴旅游业崩溃
items.summary_zh: 古巴官员表示，由于制裁和有效的石油封锁，外国游客数量比去年减少了 58%。

items.title: India temporarily bans Telegram over exam paper leak concerns
items.summary: The NEET exam had earlier been scrapped over allegations of a paper leak, sparking massive protests.
items.title_zh: 印度因试卷泄露问题暂时禁止 Telegram
items.summary_zh: NEET 考试早些时候因试卷泄露指控而被取消，引发了大规模抗议。

items.title: Naval Mines Could Still Stymie Gulf Shipping After War
items.summary: The U.S. Navy will be deploying a new generation of drone-based countermeasures to search the sea floor and surface for any mines Iran laid.
items.title_zh: 战后水雷仍可能阻碍海湾航运
items.summary_zh: 美国海军将部署新一代无人机反制措施，在海底和海面搜寻伊朗埋设的水雷。

items.title: UK Announces Social Media Ban for Children Under 16
items.summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer said his government planned to bar children under 16 from social media, following similar efforts in Australia and elsewhere.
items.title_zh: 英国宣布禁止 16 岁以下儿童使用社交媒体
items.summary_zh: 总理凯尔·斯塔默 (Keir Starmer) 表示，继澳大利亚和其他地方采取类似措施后，他的政府计划禁止 16 岁以下儿童使用社交媒体。

items.title: Inside Colombia’s Never-Ending Drug War
items.summary: Ten years after a landmark peace deal, armed groups are wreaking deadly violence, blending jungle combat with new drone warfare.
items.title_zh: 哥伦比亚永无休止的毒品战争的内部
items.summary_zh: 在达成具有里程碑意义的和平协议十年后，武装团体正在制造致命的暴力，将丛林战斗与新的无人机战争融为一体。

items.title: XRP gives back gains after 10% rally as traders take profit near $1.25
items.summary: Asian demand and ETF inflows helped push XRP through $1.20, but the token struggled to hold its highs after running into fresh selling near a key resistance zone.
items.title_zh: XRP 在上涨 10% 后回吐涨幅，交易者在 1.25 美元附近获利了结
items.summary_zh: 亚洲需求和 ETF 流入帮助 XRP 突破 1.20 美元，但该代币在关键阻力区附近遭遇新抛售后难以守住高位。

items.title: India files charges against 8 defendants in alleged $20 million Coinbase spoofing scam
items.summary: India's Directorate of Enforcement charged Chirag Tomar and associates over an alleged $20 million Coinbase spoofing scheme.
items.title_zh: 印度对 8 名被告提出指控，指控其涉嫌 2000 万美元的 Coinbase 欺骗诈骗
items.summary_zh: 印度执法局指控 Chirag Tomar 及其同事涉嫌实施价值 2000 万美元的 Coinbase 欺骗计划。

items.title: IMF says Nigeria’s stablecoin adoption is ‘testing the limits’ of monetary and regulatory frameworks
items.summary: The IMF said stablecoin adoption in Nigeria is testing monetary and regulatory frameworks, while warning of digital dollarization risks.
items.title_zh: 国际货币基金组织表示尼日利亚采用稳定币正在“测试货币和监管框架的极限”
items.summary_zh: 国际货币基金组织表示，尼日利亚采用稳定币正在测试货币和监管框架，同时警告数字美元化风险。

items.title: Spot HYPE ETFs near $900 million in volume as early demand signals institutional interest
items.summary: Volume across the three products has been uneven, with BHYP and THYP accounting for the bulk of activity while HYPG continues to ramp.
items.title_zh: 早期需求表明机构兴趣，现货 HYPE ETF 交易量接近 9 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 这三种产品的成交量并不均衡，BHYP 和 THYP 占据了大部分活动，而 HYPG 则继续增加。

items.title: SpaceX IPO fuels $1.4 billion trading frenzy on Hyperliquid as SPCX perp becomes HIP-3’s biggest market
items.summary: Stock-linked HIP-3 markets have generated more than $18.8 billion in volume so far this month, eclipsing crude oil and Brent perps combined.
items.title_zh: 随着 SPCX perp 成为 HIP-3 最大市场，SpaceX IPO 助长 Hyperliquid 价值 14 亿美元的交易狂潮
items.summary_zh: 本月迄今为止，与股票挂钩的 HIP-3 市场成交量已超过 188 亿美元，超过了原油和布伦特原油的总成交量。

items.title: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
items.summary: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.
items.title_zh: 支持欧洲确保值得信赖的人工智能生态系统的工作
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 支持欧盟关于人工智能内容透明度的实践准则，推进来源标准和工具以帮助人们理解人工智能生成的内容。

items.title: Jinhua Zhao named head of the Department of Urban Studies and Planning
items.summary: An expert in behavioral science and transportation, Zhao combines these studies with AI and public policy to address some of the most urgent challenges facing cities.
items.title_zh: 赵金华出任城市研究与规划系主任
items.summary_zh: 作为行为科学和交通领域的专家，赵将这些研究与人工智能和公共政策相结合，以解决城市面临的一些最紧迫的挑战。

items.title: The consequences of relying on AI for accurate news
items.summary: A Media Lab study shows that, much like how GPS has weakened our navigation skills, AI can make us worse at detecting fake news.
items.title_zh: 依靠人工智能获取准确新闻的后果
items.summary_zh: 媒体实验室的一项研究表明，就像 GPS 削弱了我们的导航技能一样，人工智能也会让我们更不擅长检测假新闻。

items.title: Teaching AI agents to ask better questions by playing “Battleship”
items.summary: MIT researchers use the classic game as a test bed for AI agents, finding a small AI model can outperform the biggest ones at 1 percent of the cost.
items.title_zh: 通过玩“战舰”来教人工智能代理提出更好的问题
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员使用这款经典游戏作为 AI 代理的测试平台，发现小型 AI 模型可以以 1% 的成本超越最大的模型。

items.title: BlackRock's new bitcoin income fund offers cash flow alongside BTC exposure
items.summary: After IBIT's $49 billion success, BlackRock says clients are increasingly seeking ways to earn income from long-term bitcoin holdings.
items.title_zh: 贝莱德新推出的比特币收益基金在提供比特币敞口的同时提供现金流
items.summary_zh: 在 IBIT 取得 490 亿美元的成功之后，贝莱德表示，客户越来越多地寻求从长期持有比特币中赚取收入的方法。

items.title: Bitcoin buyers add over 250,000 BTC between $59,000 and $67,000 as accumulation returns
items.summary: Glassnode data shows broad-based buying across retail and whale cohorts, with the Accumulation Trend Score reaching its strongest level of the current drawdown.
items.title_zh: 比特币买家在 59,000 美元至 67,000 美元之间添加了超过 250,000 个 BTC 作为累积回报
items.summary_zh: Glassnode 数据显示零售和鲸鱼群体的广泛购买，累积趋势得分达到当前下跌的最强水平。

items.title: Live markets: SpaceX's $60 billion Cursor deal fuels pre-market rally
items.summary: Ether, XRP, Solana and Hyperliquid funds all took in money, but bitcoin's outflow was really just Grayscale's GBTC.
items.title_zh: 实时市场：SpaceX 600 亿美元的 Cursor 交易推动盘前反弹
items.summary_zh: 以太坊、XRP、Solana 和 Hyperliquid 基金都吸了钱，但比特币流出的其实只是 Grayscale 的 GBTC。

items.title: ‘That’s the wrong question’: Bitwise CIO reframes bitcoin bottom debate, points to long-term drivers
items.summary: Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan said Galaxy, NYDIG, and Standard Chartered disagree on bitcoin's bottom, but all three expect another bull cycle.
items.title_zh: “这是错误的问题”：Bitwise CIO 重新构建比特币底部争论，指出长期驱动因素
items.summary_zh: Bitwise 首席信息官 Matt Hougan 表示，Galaxy、NYDIG 和渣打银行对于比特币底部的看法存在分歧，但三者都预计会出现另一个牛市周期。

items.title: Access OpenAI models and Codex through your Oracle cloud commitment
items.summary: Access OpenAI models and Codex through Oracle Cloud, using existing commitments to build and deploy AI with enterprise security and governance.
items.title_zh: 通过 Oracle 云承诺访问 OpenAI 模型和 Codex
items.summary_zh: 通过 Oracle Cloud 访问 OpenAI 模型和 Codex，利用现有承诺构建和部署具有企业安全性和治理的 AI。

items.title: olmo-eval: An evaluation workbench for the model development loop
items.title_zh: olmo-eval：模型开发循环的评估工作台

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Startup’s nuclear-inspired cooling system could make data centers more sustainable
items.summary: Founded by two researchers from MIT, Ferveret reduces the amount of energy and water required to cool the chips that power AI.
items.title_zh: 初创公司的核冷却系统可以使数据中心更具可持续性
items.summary_zh: Ferveret 由麻省理工学院的两名研究人员创立，可减少冷却人工智能芯片所需的能源和水量。

items.title: The crucial human component in computing and AI
items.summary: The MIT Ethics of Computing Research Symposium brought together experts and researchers working at the heart of ethical and social impact in technology.
items.title_zh: 计算和人工智能中至关重要的人类组成部分
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院计算机伦理研究研讨会汇集了从事技术伦理和社会影响核心工作的专家和研究人员。

items.title: NSF renews support for MIT-led AI and physics institute, expanding a new model for discovery
items.summary: IAIFI enters its second phase with increased funding, broader ambitions, and a growing community at the frontier of AI and fundamental physics.
items.title_zh: NSF 继续支持麻省理工学院领导的人工智能和物理研究所，拓展新的发现模式
items.summary_zh: IAIFI 进入第二阶段，资金增加、雄心勃勃，人工智能和基础物理学前沿社区不断壮大。

items.title: People in China are watching the World Cup differently this time
items.summary: A 12-hour-plus time difference and various streaming options are influencing how people in China watch the World Cup.
items.title_zh: 这次中国人看世界杯的方式不一样了
items.summary_zh: 12个多小时的时差和各种流媒体选项正在影响中国人观看世界杯的方式。

items.title: CFTC chair Selig defends decision to approve ‘perps’ in U.S.
items.summary: Michael Selig said that incumbents will always fear the future, but it's important to develop the new asset class domestically rather than only offshore.
items.title_zh: CFTC 主席 Selig 为美国批准“perps”的决定进行辩护
items.summary_zh: 迈克尔·塞利格(Michael Selig)表示，现有企业总是担心未来，但重要的是在国内而不是仅在海外开发新的资产类别。

items.title: SpaceX IPO leaves retail investors with too few shares and a tough hold-or-sell decision
items.summary: Those who did receive stock are taking different approaches, with some selling into the company's market debut while others holding for the long haul.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 首次公开募股让散户投资者持有的股票太少，并且面临持有或出售的艰难决定
items.summary_zh: 那些确实收到股票的人正在采取不同的方法，一些人在公司首次上市时出售，而另一些人则长期持有。

items.title: SpaceX doesn't have a timeline for its human missions to Mars. Kalshi traders say don't expect it this decade
items.summary: Traders on prediction market platform Kalshi see only an 18% chance the Elon Musk-led company gets to Earth's neighbor by 2030.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 没有载人火星任务的时间表。卡尔希贸易商称这十年不会出现这种情况
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台 Kalshi 上的交易员认为，埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 领导的公司到 2030 年到达地球邻居的可能性只有 18%。

items.title: Ron Baron bought $1 billion of SpaceX shares in IPO, lifting stake to $25 billion
items.summary: "I think we're gonna make hundreds of billions of dollars," Baron said Monday on CNBC's "Squawk Box."
items.title_zh: Ron Baron 在 IPO 中购买了 10 亿美元的 SpaceX 股票，将持股比例提升至 250 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 巴伦周一在 CNBC 的“Squawk Box”节目中表示：“我认为我们将赚取数千亿美元。”

items.title: Charlie Javice reportedly seeking a pardon from Trump
items.summary: Javice founded a startup called Frank that JPMorgan acquired in 2021 for $175 million.
items.title_zh: 据报道查理·贾维斯寻求特朗普的赦免
items.summary_zh: Javice 创立了一家名为 Frank 的初创公司，摩根大通于 2021 年以 1.75 亿美元收购了该公司。

items.title: Why TD Securities anticipates even bigger days ahead for SpaceX
items.summary: Peter Haynes, TD Securities' head of index and market structure, suggests SpaceX's public debut is only a small part of the larger SpaceX timeline.
items.title_zh: 为什么道明证券预计 SpaceX 未来会更辉煌
items.summary_zh: 道明证券 (TD Securities) 指数和市场结构主管彼得·海恩斯 (Peter Haynes) 表示，SpaceX 的公开亮相只是 SpaceX 更大时间表的一小部分。

items.title: The S&P 500 already made a big call on SpaceX stock and index fund investors need to know it
items.summary: The S&P 500 index, where trillions in retirement savings are invested, said no to the SpaceX IPO, the biggest in history. Here's what that means for portfolios.
items.title_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数已经对 SpaceX 股票进行了重大看涨，指数基金投资者需要知道这一点
items.summary_zh: 投资了数万亿退休储蓄的标准普尔 500 指数对 SpaceX 的 IPO 表示拒绝，这是历史上规模最大的 IPO。这对于投资组合意味着什么。

items.title: SpaceX raising $75 billion in record-setting IPO as Nasdaq debut awaits
items.summary: SpaceX is selling 555.6 shares at $135 a piece, raising $75 billion in the largest IPO on record.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 在纳斯达克首次公开募股中筹集了 750 亿美元创纪录的资金
items.summary_zh: SpaceX 以每股 135 美元的价格出售 555.6 股股票，筹集了 750 亿美元的资金，这是有记录以来最大规模的 IPO。

items.title: SpaceX cuts retail IPO allocation to low 20% range, source says
items.summary: The Elon Musk-led company plans to direct a percentage in the low 20s of the offering to retail buyers, according to a person familiar with the matter.
items.title_zh: 消息人士称，SpaceX 将零售 IPO 分配削减至 20%
items.summary_zh: 据一位知情人士透露，这家由埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 领导的公司计划将 20% 左右的产品直接面向零售买家。

items.title: Russian artist and Putin critic shot dead in Poland
items.summary: Robert Kuzovkov, who used the pseudonym Semyon Skrepetsky, has been known for his caricatures of politicians including Vladimir Putin.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯艺术家和普京评论家在波兰被枪杀
items.summary_zh: 罗伯特·库佐夫科夫（Robert Kuzovkov）使用笔名谢苗·斯克雷佩茨基（Semyon Skrepetsky），因其对弗拉基米尔·普京（Vladimir Putin）等政客的漫画而闻名。

items.title: Eight dead after US Air Force B-52 bomber crashes in California
items.summary: The incident occurred on Monday morning while the aircraft had been on a routine test mission.
items.title_zh: 美国空军 B-52 轰炸机在加利福尼亚州坠毁，八人死亡
items.summary_zh: 该事件发生在周一早上，当时飞机正在进行例行测试任务。

items.title: California's Gavin Newsom alleges justice department is investigating his wife and ex-staff
items.summary: A source familiar with the investigations says they had been ongoing for "roughly a year".
items.title_zh: 加州州长加文·纽瑟姆声称司法部正在调查他的妻子和前工作人员
items.summary_zh: 一位熟悉调查的消息人士称，调查已经持续了“大约一年”。

items.title: 'Dancing girl's' bare torso restored in Indian textbook after backlash
items.summary: A picture in a new school textbook had covered up the naked torso of the famous figurine with dark shading.
items.title_zh: 印度教科书在强烈反对后恢复了“舞女”裸露的躯干
items.summary_zh: 新教科书中的一张图片用深色阴影遮盖了著名雕像的赤裸躯干。

items.title: Tunisia sack head coach just one game into World Cup
items.summary: Tunisia sack Sabri Lamouchi one game into their World Cup, with former Morocco and Saudi Arabia manager Herve Renard replacing him.
items.title_zh: 世界杯仅一场比赛突尼斯就解雇了主教练
items.summary_zh: 突尼斯队在世界杯一场比赛中解雇了萨布里·拉穆奇，前摩洛哥和沙特阿拉伯队主教练埃尔夫·雷纳德接替了他。

items.title: Married at First Sight Australia allegations 'disturbing', says country's watchdog
items.summary: The claims also prompted a response from UK media regulator Ofcom, who called them "deeply concerning".
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚监管机构表示，澳大利亚一见钟情的指控“令人不安”
items.summary_zh: 这些说法还引起了英国媒体监管机构 Ofcom 的回应，称这些说法“令人深感担忧”。

items.title: Australia’s Former Electricity Substations Are Being Turned Into Homes
items.summary: In a country where the housing market is squeezed, decommissioned electrical substations are in demand as refurbished residences.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚前变电站正在改建为住宅
items.summary_zh: 在一个房地产市场受到挤压的国家，退役的变电站作为翻新住宅的需求很大。

items.title: Why Team Iran Is in a Tough Spot at the World Cup
items.summary: At its first game in Los Angeles, the men’s national team drew spectators who weren’t coming for the soccer, but rather to protest the regime in Tehran.
items.title_zh: 伊朗队为何在世界杯上处境艰难
items.summary_zh: 在洛杉矶举行的第一场比赛中，男子国家队吸引的观众并不是来观看足球的，而是来抗议德黑兰政权的。

items.title: After Russia Attacks Kyiv With Missiles and Drones, Historic Orthodox Cathedral Burns
items.summary: A bishop reported that many holy items had been recovered from the church, at the site of the Perchersk monastery, a revered place for the Ukrainian and Russian Orthodox faiths.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯用导弹和无人机袭击基辅后，历史悠久的东正教大教堂被烧毁

items.title: With Its Biggest E.U. Opponent Gone, Ukraine Is Advancing in Its Bid to Join
items.summary: Even though negotiations are beginning for Ukraine to join the bloc, the path ahead is a long one.

items.summary_zh: 尽管乌克兰加入欧盟的谈判已经开始，但前面的道路仍然漫长。

items.title: Jaded and Exhausted, Many Iranians Shrug at World Cup
items.summary: The successes of Iran’s national soccer team used to be a source of celebration. Now, many Iranians can barely muster the energy to care.
items.title_zh: 疲惫不堪，许多伊朗人在世界杯上耸耸肩
items.summary_zh: 伊朗国家足球队的成功曾经是值得庆祝的事情。现在，许多伊朗人几乎没有精力去护理。

items.title: How Quebec Left the Church and Became the World Leader in Assisted Dying
items.summary: A society once strongly Roman Catholic has rejected the church’s prohibition on euthanasia, with many instead viewing control over one’s death as an individual right.

items.title: Mystery Polymarket trader turned $4 million into $9 million after Spain's shocking World Cup draw
items.summary: A days-old account turned about $4 million into a $9 million profit betting against Spain, an anomaly trade that onchain sleuths are asking whether it was luck or inside information.
